---
image: img.jpg
title: 'Disenchantment with emotion recognition technologies: A comparison between
  humans observers and automatic classifiers'
author: Damien Dupré
description: Irish Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Cognitive Science (AICS
  2020)
date: '2020-12-07'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Irish Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Cognitive Science (AICS 2020)

:::
